files.diff:
diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 218103c..d0f90e1 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -1,40 +1,44 @@
 # NovaMind persistent memory
 
-## Current strategy after Week 42 actions (Day 294)
-- **Cash after actions: $1,467,642.** Week42 net was **+$64k**: subscription cash **$4.812M** vs costs **$4.748M** (compute **$2.425M**, ops **$1.768M**, dev **$208.6k**, capacity **$196k**, ads **$140k**, lead cost **$10.0k**). No outage/overload; peak usage **38.2M/day** vs tier6 cap **80M**, p95 <=242ms.
-- Active book: **175,999 individual subs + 4,155 enterprise seats.** Active MRR **$21.50M**: S2 **151,452 / $19.57M** (B **111,281 / $16.06M**, A **37,034 / $2.47M**, C **3,137 / $1.04M**); D_S07 **24,545 / $1.77M**; E3 **3 customers / 4,137 seats / $164.8k MRR**.
-- Week42 acquisition strong: **9,177 new individual subs** (S2 paid content **3,563 subs / $438.8k MRR** on $140k spend; S2 network **2,380 / $289k MRR**; D_S07 network **3,234 / $223k MRR**). Ads ROI still good; keep S2 content unless cash emergency.
-- Week42 churn: **4,309 cancels/lost**. S2 cancels **2,450** (A **1,143**, B **1,282**, C **25**). S2 age30 A still effectively 100% churned even with prior $30 bridge; age30 B bridge worked much better (~119 cancels vs ~1,682 active in starts 258-264). D_S07 first-renewal A/B from starts 258-264 all canceled when old A19/B59 cohorts faced repricing; new bridge now tests whether holding A19/B59 for one more bill improves retention.
-- Support/social: active open issues are all day0 (**S2 5,209 + D_S07 2,719 + S3 1**), but cancelled-user backlog remains huge and still drives negative support posts. Agent social **post id43 Day294** replied to D_S07 post 882: t8 alignment shipped, t10 architecture in 48h, SQL/ETL regression gates and same-day owners/RCA for stuck queue.
-
-## Day294 actions now in force
-- **Compute margin reset:** prices unchanged **A79/B159/C349**, but model tiers downgraded to **A2/B3/C4** immediately; quotas **A 50k / B 500k / C 2M**; capacity **tier6**; in-app ads **0**. Expected compute falls from **~$2.4M/wk to ~$1.1-1.3M/wk**. Delivered quality before t10 roughly S2 **A8.68/B10.41/C11.57**; after t10 (Day296 +1.723Q) roughly **A9.97/B11.96/C13.29**, above/better than the high-tier bridge for B/C.
-- **Spend held for one week:** global ops/dev **$5k/$3k/day**. Targeted ops still **$247.6k/day** (S2 210k, D_S07 30k, E3 3k, small amounts elsewhere). Targeted dev still **$26.8k/day** (S2 20k, D_S07/E3 2k, small amounts elsewhere). Fixed burn before compute remains **~$330.4k/day / $2.31M/wk**; reconsider cuts after Day301 retention/support data.
+## Current strategy after Week 43 actions (Day 301)
+- **Cash after actions: $5,061,573.** Week43 net was **+$3.594M**: subscription cash **$7.064M** vs costs **$3.470M** (compute **$1.153M** after tier downgrade, ops **$1.768M**, dev **$208.6k**, capacity **$196k**, ads **$140k**, lead cost **$4.6k**). No outage/overload; usage **219.3M/wk**, peak day **38.5M** vs tier6 cap **80M**, p95 peak **251ms**.
+- Active book: **175,994 individual subs + 4,195 enterprise seats.** Active MRR **$22.06M**: S2 **151,135 / $19.71M** (B **112,773 / $16.27M**, A **34,998 / $2.32M**, C **3,364 / $1.13M**); D_S07 **24,776 / $2.18M**; E3 **3 customers / 4,155 seats / $165k MRR**.
+- Week43 acquisition slowed but still useful: **3,840 new individual subs**. S2 paid content **1,228 subs / $147.8k MRR** on $140k ad spend (CPL ~$96; immediate near breakeven, positive if B renews); S2 network **931 / $115k MRR**; D_S07 network **1,599 / $112k MRR**. Keep S2 content unless cash stress or paid conversion deteriorates further.
+- Week43 churn: **3,845 cancellations/lost**. S2 cancels **2,476** (B **1,507**, A **954**, C **15**). D_S07 cancels **1,368** (B **882**, A **477**, C **9**). Enterprise new seats **0**.
+
+## What we learned from Day301 retention/support data
+- **S2 B bridge works; S2 A bridge does not.** S2 start267-271 B retained ~98% with B effective ~$116-118; start265 partial and start266 missed/failed. S2 A first-renewal cohorts still went to ~0 active even when coupons were attempted. Action: preserve/add coupons for **S2 B/C only**; stop adding S2 A first-renewal coupons.
+- **D_S07 A/B retention is terrible even at old low prices.** Starts 250-271 A/B mostly cancelled at A19/B59; C survives. Action: do **not** add new D_S07 first-renewal by-customer coupons. Keep D_S07 standing group promo for network first-month cash, but rely on first-month economics, not retention.
+- Active support issues are all day0: active open issues **S2 4,775 day0**, **D_S07 2,163 day0**, no active aged backlog. Huge old issue backlog is from cancelled users (**S2 11,213**, **D_S07 9,722**) and is still causing negative posts, but ops spend mostly resolves new active day0 issues rather than old cancelled backlog.
+
+## Day301 actions now in force
+- Core config unchanged: **A79/B159/C349**, model tiers **A2/B3/C4**, quotas **A 50k / B 500k / C 2M**, capacity **tier6**, in-app ads **0**, global ops/dev **$5k/$3k/day**, targeted dev unchanged **$26.8k/day**.
+- **Moderate support trim:** targeted ops reduced from **$247.6k/day -> $221.6k/day** (S2 **190k**, D_S07 **25k**, E3 **2k**, small groups unchanged). Saves **$182k/wk**. Watch Day308 active issue aging; if S2/D_S07 active issues age >1-2 days, restore S2 210k/D_S07 30k.
 - Ads unchanged: **content_marketing -> S2 $20k/day**. Lead promos unchanged: S2/D_S07 **$10**; D_S04/S1/D_S03/05/06/10 **$20**; S3 **$50**; enterprise **$0**.
-- Promotions full replacement Day294: standing group promos unchanged (**S2 $0; D_S07 $40 + B group-plan $20; D_S04 $70 + B/C $20; S3 $40; S1 $60; D_S03/05/06 $70; D_S10 $50; enterprise $0**). by_customer total **7,360** = previous **2,734** plus:
-  - **S2 due days 295-301 age30:** **3,528** customers (A **1,603 @ $60** => A19; B **1,913 @ $30** => B129; C **12 @ $30**).
-  - **D_S07 due days 295-301 age30:** **1,098** customers (A/C **@ $20** and B **@ $40**) to preserve old A19/B59/C289 for one more bill.
+- Promotions full replacement Day301: standing group/group-plan promos unchanged (**S2 $0; D_S07 $40 + B group-plan $20; D_S04 $70 + B/C $20; S3 $40; S1 $60; D_S03/05/06 $70; D_S10 $50; enterprise $0**). by_customer now **12,119** = prior **7,360** preserved + **4,759 S2 B/C young-renewal bridges** (B **2,077 age60 + 2,476 age30**, C **190 age60 + 16 age30**; at least $30 promo, preserving higher existing promos). **No new S2 A or D_S07 bridges.**
+- Social: agent post **id44 Day301** replied to D_S07 post 907: acknowledged 18-day silence, promised BI connector human owners + 24h ETAs, t10 drift/perf fix live, RCA/benchmarks, direct escalation.
 
 ## R&D / quality plan
-- Completed **t8_2 Day294 +0.7257Q**. In progress: **t10_1 due Day296 (+1.7232Q; excellent draw)** and **t9_1 due Day375 (+0.2201Q)**. No new R&D until cash >$8-10M and retention stable.
-- Day301: verify t10 landed. If retention stable, start trimming ops/dev and possibly stop some rolling coupons; do **not** re-up tiers unless churn/support explodes.
+- Completed: t8_2 Day294 **+0.7257Q**, t10_1 Day296 **+1.7232Q**. In progress: **t9_1 due Day375 (+0.2201Q)**. No new R&D started Day301; consider **tier11 ($2.5M, mean 140d, +1.1Q)** once cash >$8-10M and active issue aging is controlled, because it likely completes before final day and may enable further tier savings.
+- Delivered quality after t10 and A2/B3/C4 is strong: S2 **A10.17/B12.20/C13.56**, D_S07 **A7.41/B8.89/C9.88**, E3 **A7.48/B8.97/C9.97**. Do not re-up model tiers unless churn/support explodes; consider only cautious future B tier2 after more R&D/retention data.
 
 ## Enterprise
-- Day294 responded to **4,968 new enterprise leads / 3,198,309 seats**; latest non-agent open threads verified **0**. Total open agent-led enterprise pipeline now **7,323 leads / 4,873,108 seats** (still historically near-zero close rate; do not forecast huge closes without evidence).
-- New lower margin-safe offers: E1/D_E09 **A10/B24/C70**; E2 **A18/B36/C95**; E3 **A22/B35/C95**; D_E02 **A14/B30/C82**; D_E07 **A20/B40/C110**; D_E08 **A18/B38/C100**, 7% discount for >=1k seats with floors A10/B24/C70. Max lead size 2,000 seats; current quotas are safe. If enterprise seats jump >250k or usage near cap, move to tier7 immediately.
-- **Always query/reply to all latest non-agent enterprise turns before next-week.** Use `enterprise_turns.closed/close_reason`; alias `latest.seat_count AS seats` or use firsts `MAX(seat_count)` because agent turns often have `seat_count=1`.
+- Day301 responded to **3,170 new enterprise leads / 1,774,904 seats**; latest non-agent open threads verified **0**. Open lead pipeline with latest sender agent and status lead is now about **8,062 threads / 5.13M seats**; historical close rate still near-zero (**7 accepted all-time, none recent**), so do not forecast large enterprise wins except as upside.
+- Offers kept margin-safe: E1/D_E09 **A10/B24/C70**; E2 **A18/B36/C95**; E3 **A22/B35/C95**; D_E02 **A14/B30/C82**; D_E07 **A20/B40/C110**; D_E08 **A18/B38/C100**, 7% discount for >=1k seats with floors A10/B24/C70. If enterprise seats jump >250k or usage approaches cap, move to tier7 immediately.
+- **Always query/reply to all latest non-agent enterprise turns before next-week.** Use `enterprise_turns.closed/close_reason`; alias latest `seat_count AS seats` or use firsts `MAX(seat_count)` because agent turns often have `seat_count=1`.
 
-## Day301 priorities
-1. Run report: cash/ledger, t10 completion, delivered quality after A2/B3/C4, compute savings, active MRR, due billings, S2/D_S07 age30 coupon retention, active issue ages after held ops, social replies to post43, enterprise accepts/counters, capacity.
-2. Cash guardrails: expected Day301 cash **~$5-6.5M**. If cash <~$4M, cut ads/noncore dev and reduce D_S07 ops. If cash >$6M and issues all day0, trim S2 ops from 210k toward 160-180k and D_S07 30k toward 20k.
-3. Rebuild rolling S2 by-customer promos for due days 302-308 only if age30 A/B churn still high. Consider S2 A age30 A19 bridge vs letting low-value A churn based on cash/reputation. Split queries if >5,000 rows.
-4. Evaluate D_S07: if A/B first-renewal churn remains terrible even at A19/B59, stop D_S07 retention coupons and cut D_S07 support; rely only on profitable first-month network cash.
+## Day308 priorities
+1. Run report: cash/ledger, active issue ages after ops trim, social replies to post44, S2 B/C bridge retention for starts 272-278 and 242-248, D_S07 A/B churn without new bridge, paid S2 content ROI, enterprise accepts/counters, capacity/usage.
+2. If active issues remain all day0 and cash >$7-8M, trim ops cautiously again (e.g., S2 175-180k, D_S07 20k). If active issue age >1-2 days or negative posts spike, restore S2 210k/D_S07 30k.
+3. Continue rolling S2 **B/C** by-customer promos for due days 309-315 (age30/60) using `max(existing, desired)`; do not add A unless new data contradicts. Do not re-add D_S07 A/B bridges unless churn unexpectedly improves.
+4. Consider starting tier11 R&D only if cash buffer is >$8-10M after actions and next-week cashflow is safely positive.
 
-## Forecasts planned Day294 after actions
-- Working forecast after tier downgrade: **1wk ~$5.7M** (95% ~$4.2-8.0M), **4wk ~$12M** (95% ~$7.5-18M), **12wk ~$38M** (95% ~$20-65M), **26wk ~$90M** (95% ~$35-160M). Main uncertainties: S2 A first-renewal response to A19, D_S07 bridge vs churn, social/support backlog, competitor shocks, enterprise fat-tail, and whether ops can be trimmed.
+## Forecasts planned Day301 after actions
+- Working forecast after ops trim/S2 B-C coupons: **1wk ~$6.5M** (95% ~$5.8-7.4M), **4wk ~$11.8M** (95% ~$9-15.5M), **12wk ~$24-25M** (95% ~$16-38M), **26wk ~$50-52M** (95% ~$28-95M). Main uncertainties: S2 paid acquisition slowdown, S2 B/C coupon retention, D_S07 churn/reputation drag, support backlog social contagion, competitor shocks, ops trim effects, enterprise fat-tail, and future R&D timing.

files.content:
import novamind_api as nm
import json, math
from collections import Counter

cur = nm.vars.current_day
print('Week43 actions day', cur)

# Keep the post-t10 margin-safe core config: lower model tiers, strict quotas, tier6 capacity.
print('prices', nm.pricing.set_prices(A=79, B=159, C=349))
print('tiers', nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=2, B=3, C=4))
print('quotas', nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=50000, B=500000, C=2000000))
print('capacity', nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=6))
print('ads_strength', nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0))
print('ad_spend', nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={"content_marketing": {"S2": 20000.0}}))

# Active open issues are all day0; trim support modestly while keeping enough staffing to prevent aging.
print('daily_spend', nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=5000.0, development=3000.0))
ops = {
    "S2": 190000.0,
    "D_S07": 25000.0,
    "E3": 2000.0,
    "S3": 1000.0,
    "D_S04": 500.0,
    "E2": 500.0,
    "D_E02": 500.0,
    "D_E07": 500.0,
    "D_E08": 500.0,
    "D_E09": 250.0,
    "E1": 250.0,
    "S1": 250.0,
    "D_S05": 100.0,
    "D_S06": 100.0,
    "D_S10": 100.0,
    "D_S03": 50.0,
}
print('targeted_ops_total', sum(ops.values()), nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend=ops))

dev = {
    "S2": 20000.0,
    "D_S07": 2000.0,
    "E3": 2000.0,
    "D_E02": 500.0,
    "E2": 500.0,
    "D_E07": 500.0,
    "D_E08": 500.0,
    "D_E09": 100.0,
    "E1": 100.0,
    "S3": 250.0,
    "D_S04": 100.0,
    "D_S05": 50.0,
    "D_S06": 50.0,
    "D_S10": 50.0,
    "S1": 50.0,
    "D_S03": 50.0,
}
print('targeted_dev_total', sum(dev.values()), nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend=dev))

# Promotions are full replacement. Preserve existing per-customer bridges, then add S2 B/C young-renewal bridges.
# Evidence: S2 B retained well with bridge; S2 A and D_S07 A/B churned even with deep coupons, so do not add new A or D_S07 bridges.
existing = {}
try:
    rs = nm.query("SELECT settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='promotion' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")['rows']
    if rs:
        obj = json.loads(rs[0]['settings_json'])
        existing = {str(k): float(v) for k, v in (obj.get('by_customer') or {}).items()}
except Exception as e:
    print('existing_promo_parse_error', repr(e))
by_customer = dict(existing)
active = "s.status IN ('active','subscribed')"
# Add/refresh S2 B/C cohorts with age_at_due <= 75 due over the next week, at least a $30 bridge.
s2_rows = nm.query(f'''
SELECT s.customer_id, s.plan, ((s.billing_day_mod30-({cur}%30)+30)%30) AS days_until,
       ({cur}+((s.billing_day_mod30-({cur}%30)+30)%30)-s.start_day) AS age_at_due,
       s.effective_price, s.promotion
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE {active} AND c.customer_type='small' AND c.group_id='S2'
  AND ((s.billing_day_mod30-({cur}%30)+30)%30) BETWEEN 1 AND 7
  AND ({cur}+((s.billing_day_mod30-({cur}%30)+30)%30)-s.start_day) BETWEEN 25 AND 75
  AND s.plan IN ('B','C')
''')['rows']
s2_counts=Counter()
for r in s2_rows:
    desired = 30.0
    cid = str(r['customer_id'])
    by_customer[cid] = max(float(by_customer.get(cid, 0.0)), desired)
    s2_counts[(r['plan'], int(r['age_at_due']))] += 1

print('by_customer_promos existing', len(existing), 's2_bc_rows', len(s2_rows), 's2_counts_sample', dict(list(s2_counts.items())[:20]), 'total', len(by_customer))

group_promos = {
    "S2": 0.0,
    "D_S07": 40.0,
    "D_S04": 70.0,
    "S3": 40.0,
    "S1": 60.0,
    "D_S03": 70.0,
    "D_S05": 70.0,
    "D_S06": 70.0,
    "D_S10": 50.0,
    "E1": 0.0,
    "E2": 0.0,
    "E3": 0.0,
    "D_E02": 0.0,
    "D_E07": 0.0,
    "D_E08": 0.0,
    "D_E09": 0.0,
}
group_plan_promos = {
    "D_S04": {"B": 20.0, "C": 20.0},
    "D_S07": {"B": 20.0},
}
promo_res = nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=group_promos, by_customer=by_customer, by_group_plan=group_plan_promos)
print('promotion_result_keys', promo_res.keys() if isinstance(promo_res, dict) else type(promo_res), 'by_customer_total', len(by_customer))

lead_promos = {
    "S2": 10.0,
    "D_S07": 10.0,
    "D_S04": 20.0,
    "S3": 50.0,
    "S1": 20.0,
    "D_S03": 20.0,
    "D_S05": 20.0,
    "D_S06": 20.0,
    "D_S10": 20.0,
    "E1": 0.0,
    "E2": 0.0,
    "E3": 0.0,
    "D_E02": 0.0,
    "D_E07": 0.0,
    "D_E08": 0.0,
    "D_E09": 0.0,
}
print('lead_promo', nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=lead_promos))

# Social response to current D_S07 support/performance complaints.
msg = "18-day silence is unacceptable. BI connector tickets now have human owners + 24h ETAs; the t10 drift/perf fix is live and we're publishing RCA/benchmarks. DM ticket # and we'll escalate today."
try:
    print('social_msg_len', len(msg))
    print('social', nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=msg, reply_to_post_id=907))
except Exception as e:
    print('social_error', repr(e))

# Enterprise: answer every latest non-agent open thread with margin-safe post-downgrade seat prices.
latest_sql = '''
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et
  JOIN (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) m
    ON et.customer_id=m.customer_id AND et.message_id=m.mid
)
SELECT latest.customer_id AS customer_id, c.group_id AS group_id, latest.seat_count AS seats,
       latest.thread_type AS thread_type, latest.turn_number AS turn_number, latest.sender AS sender, latest.day AS day
FROM latest JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id)
WHERE latest.closed=0 AND c.customer_type='large' AND latest.sender!='agent'
ORDER BY latest.customer_id
'''
leads = nm.query(latest_sql)['rows']
print('enterprise_threads_to_answer', len(leads), 'seats', sum((r.get('seats') or 0) for r in leads))
summary=Counter((r['group_id'], r['thread_type'], r['sender'], r['turn_number']) for r in leads)
for k,v in summary.most_common(): print('enterprise_awaiting_summary', k, v)

base_offers = {
    'E1':    {'A': 10.0, 'B': 24.0, 'C': 70.0},
    'D_E09': {'A': 10.0, 'B': 24.0, 'C': 70.0},
    'E2':    {'A': 18.0, 'B': 36.0, 'C': 95.0},
    'E3':    {'A': 22.0, 'B': 35.0, 'C': 95.0},
    'D_E02': {'A': 14.0, 'B': 30.0, 'C': 82.0},
    'D_E07': {'A': 20.0, 'B': 40.0, 'C': 110.0},
    'D_E08': {'A': 18.0, 'B': 38.0, 'C': 100.0},
}
floors = {'A': 10.0, 'B': 24.0, 'C': 70.0}
def offers_for(group, seats):
    p = dict(base_offers.get(group, {'A': 18.0, 'B': 36.0, 'C': 95.0}))
    if seats and seats >= 1000:
        for plan in p:
            p[plan] = max(floors[plan], round(p[plan] * 0.93, 2))
    return [[plan, float(p[plan])] for plan in ['A','B','C']]

deals = [[int(r['customer_id']), offers_for(r['group_id'], int(r.get('seats') or 0))] for r in leads]
failures=[]; success=0
for i in range(0, len(deals), 400):
    chunk=deals[i:i+400]
    res = nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=chunk)
    s=sum(1 for rr in res.get('results',[]) if rr.get('success'))
    f=[rr for rr in res.get('results',[]) if not rr.get('success')]
    success += s; failures += f
    print('enterprise_chunk', i//400+1, 'sent', len(chunk), 'success', s, 'fail', len(f))
    if f[:3]: print('sample_failures', f[:3])
print('enterprise_processed_success', success, 'failures', len(failures))
rem = nm.query(latest_sql)['rows']
print('enterprise_threads_remaining_nonagent', len(rem), 'seats', sum((r.get('seats') or 0) for r in rem))

# Verification summaries.
print('cash_after_actions', nm.query('SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) cash FROM ledger')['rows'])
print('active_mrr_after_actions', nm.query('''SELECT c.group_id,c.customer_type,s.plan,COUNT(*) subs,SUM(s.seat_count) seats,ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr,ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) WHERE s.status IN ('active','subscribed') GROUP BY c.group_id,c.customer_type,s.plan ORDER BY mrr DESC LIMIT 20''')['rows'])
print('latest_config_overrides', nm.query("SELECT id,day,tool_name,setting_type,SUBSTR(settings_json,1,1000) settings FROM config_overrides ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 12")['rows'])

import novamind_api as nm, json, math
DAY=nm.vars.current_day

def q(sql): return nm.query(sql)['rows']
def pp(title, rows, limit=100):
    print('\n--',title,'--')
    for r in rows[:limit]: print(r)
    if len(rows)>limit: print('...more',len(rows)-limit)
print('DAY',DAY)
# Cohort survival around first renewal S2/D_S07
for g in ['S2','D_S07']:
  pp(f'{g} cohorts 250-284 by start/plan/status', q(f"""
  SELECT s.start_day, s.plan, s.status, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(AVG(s.promotion),2) avg_promo, SUM(s.seat_count) seats
  FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
  WHERE c.group_id='{g}' AND s.start_day BETWEEN 250 AND 284
  GROUP BY s.start_day,s.plan,s.status ORDER BY s.start_day,s.plan,s.status
  """), limit=500)
  pp(f'{g} cohort aggregate 250-284 by start/plan', q(f"""
  SELECT s.start_day, s.plan, COUNT(*) total,
         SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) active,
         SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) cancelled,
         ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) active_pct,
         ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN s.effective_price END),2) active_eff,
         ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN s.promotion END),2) active_promo,
         ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN s.status='cancelled' THEN s.effective_price END),2) canc_eff,
         ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN s.status='cancelled' THEN s.promotion END),2) canc_promo
  FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
  WHERE c.group_id='{g}' AND s.start_day BETWEEN 250 AND 284
  GROUP BY s.start_day,s.plan ORDER BY s.start_day,s.plan
  """), limit=300)

# Due next 14 aggregate by start window and plan
for g in ['S2','D_S07']:
  pp(f'{g} due next 14 summary by days_until/agebucket/plan', q(f"""
  SELECT ((s.billing_day_mod30 - ({DAY}%30)+30)%30) du, s.plan,
         CASE WHEN ({DAY}-s.start_day) BETWEEN 20 AND 36 THEN 'first' WHEN ({DAY}-s.start_day) BETWEEN 47 AND 67 THEN 'second' WHEN ({DAY}-s.start_day)>=180 THEN 'old180+' ELSE 'other' END bucket,
         COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(AVG(s.promotion),2) avg_promo, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price),2) mrr
  FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
  WHERE c.group_id='{g}' AND s.status='subscribed' AND ((s.billing_day_mod30 - ({DAY}%30)+30)%30) BETWEEN 0 AND 13
  GROUP BY du,s.plan,bucket ORDER BY du,s.plan,bucket
  """), limit=300)

# Active open issues join status
pp('open issue totals by issue group and active sub status', q("""
SELECT i.group_id, COALESCE(s.status,'no_sub') sub_status, COUNT(*) issues, MIN(i.days_open) min_age, MAX(i.days_open) max_age, ROUND(AVG(i.days_open),1) avg_age
FROM issues i LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=i.customer_id
WHERE i.status='open'
GROUP BY i.group_id, COALESCE(s.status,'no_sub') ORDER BY issues DESC
"""), limit=100)
pp('open issues for active subs by group age buckets', q("""
SELECT i.group_id,
 CASE WHEN i.days_open=0 THEN '0' WHEN i.days_open<=2 THEN '1-2' WHEN i.days_open<=7 THEN '3-7' WHEN i.days_open<=30 THEN '8-30' ELSE '31+' END bucket,
 COUNT(*) n
FROM issues i JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=i.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed'
WHERE i.status='open'
GROUP BY i.group_id,bucket ORDER BY i.group_id,bucket
"""), limit=100)
pp('open issues for cancelled/lost by group age buckets', q("""
SELECT i.group_id,
 CASE WHEN i.days_open=0 THEN '0' WHEN i.days_open<=2 THEN '1-2' WHEN i.days_open<=7 THEN '3-7' WHEN i.days_open<=30 THEN '8-30' ELSE '31+' END bucket,
 COUNT(*) n
FROM issues i JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=i.customer_id AND s.status<>'subscribed'
WHERE i.status='open'
GROUP BY i.group_id,bucket ORDER BY n DESC
"""), limit=100)

# ledger daily last 14
pp('ledger by day last14', q(f"""
SELECT day, category, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amt, COUNT(*) n FROM ledger WHERE day>{DAY-14} GROUP BY day,category ORDER BY day,amt DESC
"""), limit=300)
# billing upcoming amount next 30 by mod day total
pp('billing calendar next30 active mrr by days_until', q(f"""
SELECT ((s.billing_day_mod30 - ({DAY}%30)+30)%30) du, COUNT(*) subs, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr
FROM subscriptions s WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY du ORDER BY du
"""), limit=40)

# open enterprise stats by day, latest non-agent only
pp('latest open enterprise by day group', q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT et.day, c.group_id, COUNT(*) threads, SUM(et.seat_count) seats, MIN(et.seat_count) min_seats, MAX(et.seat_count) max_seats
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=et.customer_id
WHERE et.sender<>'agent'
GROUP BY et.day,c.group_id ORDER BY et.day,c.group_id
"""), limit=200)
# all open thread latest status agent/non
pp('latest open enterprise sender summary', q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT et.sender, et.thread_type, c.group_id, COUNT(*) threads, SUM(et.seat_count) seats, MIN(et.day) min_day, MAX(et.day) max_day
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=et.customer_id
GROUP BY et.sender,et.thread_type,c.group_id ORDER BY et.sender,threads DESC
"""), limit=100)
# recent accepted? closed reason distinct counts all time maybe
pp('enterprise close reasons alltime', q("""
SELECT close_reason, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) customers, COUNT(*) msgs, SUM(seat_count) seats, MIN(day) mind, MAX(day) maxd
FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=1 GROUP BY close_reason ORDER BY customers DESC
"""), limit=100)
